relics.name: Guardian Core
relics.appearance: A dark metal circular core with a brilliant cyan lens at its center, surrounded by glowing blue energy rings like a compact shield generator.
relics.ui_desc: Gain a regenerating shield. It returns after 3s without being hit, but you take 8% more damage.

relics.name: Blade Emblem
relics.appearance: A pair of crossed silver blades bound by a deep red wrap, with a gold-edged crest at the center and red slash energy flaring behind them.
relics.ui_desc: +2 projectile damage per rank, but +6% shoot cooldown per rank.

relics.name: Nexus Lens
relics.appearance: A radiant blue-white orb held inside an ornate gold and navy frame, with fiery golden energy curling around it like a focused cosmic lens.
relics.ui_desc: -10% shoot cooldown per rank, but -4 max health per rank.

relics.name: Voidstep Spindle
relics.appearance: A narrow obsidian spindle threaded with violet energy strands that blur at the edges.
relics.ui_desc: +0.5 speed per rank, but -8 max health per rank.

relics.name: Chrono Spring
relics.appearance: A brass spiral spring surrounding a glowing clock core, shedding pale blue motes of light.
relics.ui_desc: -12% dash cooldown per rank, but +10% damage taken per rank.

relics.name: Queen Shard
relics.appearance: A jagged magenta shard with branching neon veins and a pulsing, unstable inner glow.
relics.ui_desc: +1 spread shot level per rank, but +12% shoot cooldown per rank.

relics.name: Tempest Feather
relics.appearance: A long silver-blue feather crackling with static and trailing tiny arcs of wind-tossed light.
relics.ui_desc: +1.5 projectile speed per rank, but -0.15 movement speed per rank.

relics.name: Thunder Capacitor
relics.appearance: A gold cylinder packed with bright lightning coils and capped by humming storm-metal plates.
relics.ui_desc: +12% dash speed per rank, but +8% dash cooldown per rank.

relics.name: Phoenix Ember
relics.appearance: A smoldering emberstone with a molten orange core and soft red feathers of flame around it.
relics.ui_desc: +2 regen level per rank, but -10 max health per rank.

relics.name: Crystal Plate
relics.appearance: A broad prism plate of pale violet crystal, cut into layered facets that catch the light.
relics.ui_desc: +14 starting heal per rank, but +6% damage taken per rank.

relics.name: Dragon Fang
relics.appearance: A long ivory fang engraved with ember-red runes and banded in dark bronze near the base.
relics.ui_desc: Shots pierce and gain +3 damage, but you take 15% more damage.

relics.name: Frost Loop
relics.appearance: A circular ring of frosted crystal and steel, rimmed with drifting flakes and a cold blue sheen.
relics.ui_desc: +8 max health and +0.2 speed per rank, but +4% shoot cooldown per rank.

relics.name: Magma Heart
relics.appearance: A heavy black-red stone with glowing lava seams, radiating heat through cracked metallic braces.
relics.ui_desc: +2 damage and +1 projectile speed per rank, but -6 max health per rank.

relics.name: Overlord Mesh
relics.appearance: A folded sheet of chrome-black mesh threaded with teal circuitry and mirror-bright facets.
relics.ui_desc: +3 reflection charges per rank, but -0.2 movement speed per rank.
